prediction.reasoning: Based on BAC's historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annually (roughly 1.5-2% weekly standard deviation) and typical banking sector performance patterns. The slight upward bias reflects potential end-of-year positioning and recent banking sector momentum, though limited to modest gains given current economic uncertainties and interest rate environment. Confidence intervals widen appropriately to capture increasing uncertainty over the 7-day horizon.
